# Agentforce Developer Guide (Einstein GenAI Guide)

## Main Title & Overview
"Get Started with Agentforce and AI Agents"

The page introduces Agentforce as an agent-driven layer of the Salesforce Platform. It emphasizes deployment of AI agents working alongside employees to extend workforce capacity and provide 24/7 customer service. The Trust Layer securely integrates data with large language models.

## Key Sections

### Overview Guides
1. **Agentforce APIs and SDKs** - Resources for building powerful Agentforce solutions using various APIs and SDKs
2. **Agentforce Actions** - Documentation for building and enhancing Agentforce actions

### Development Tools
1. **Agent Script** - Language for building agents within Agentforce Builder
2. **Agentforce DX** - Pro-code tools for Salesforce CLI and VS Code
3. **Models and Prompts** - Features for creating, managing, and deploying prompt templates

### Terminology Update (NEW — April 2026)
- **Subagents** - Beginning April 2026, "topics" are now called "subagents" (no functional changes, terminology transition only)

## Additional Resources
- Salesforce Help: Agentforce and Generative AI
- Salesforce Help: Agentforce Agents

## Last Fetched
2026-04-12 - No new features detected beyond previous fetch. No changes from 2026-04-10.
